fields.id: Stable lowercase identifier used by config/default.json and CLI tools.

positioning.oneLiner: Plain-English description of what the company does.
positioning.differentiators: Specific reasons this company is meaningfully different.

icp.bestFit: Traits of high-fit accounts and buyers.
icp.poorFit: Traits that should reduce confidence or trigger disqualification.
icp.buyerPersonas: Roles, priorities, pains, and objections by persona.

fields.offers: Products or services the coach is allowed to recommend.

salesMotion.averageContractValue: Typical contract value and payment model.
salesMotion.coachBias: Behavioral bias the coach should optimize for.

fields.callFlow: Time-boxed live-call stages and branch rules.
fields.qualificationSegments: Segment-specific diagnosis logic, especially Contractor A, Contractor B, and poor-fit profiles.
fields.commercialModel: Plans, pricing, guarantees, commissions, promotions, and close requirements.
fields.complianceGuardrails: Claims that must be included, avoided, or qualified.
fields.proof: Case studies, metrics, testimonials, or claims the coach can reference.
fields.objections: Known objections and approved response strategy.
fields.sourceMetadata: Summarized source references by document and topic. Avoid large raw excerpts.
